steps.title: Identify the passage's two-part structure
steps.content: The passage describes a map collection and then explains how it was made—consulting existing maps and interviewing travelers.

steps.title: Match the purpose to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly captures the passage's dual focus: describing the collection and explaining how al-Idrisi created it. The others either discuss elements the passage doesn't address (benefits, technique comparisons) or misidentify who created what. That matches choice C — C is correct.
